raw_consumer_statement:
I am submitting this complaint regarding XXXX XXXX handling of a fraudulent charge on my account. 

On XXXX XXXX, I did not authorize a transaction to XXXX for amount of {$3800.00}. For that matter, I have NEVER made a purchase through XXXX. 

On XX/XX/year>, I received a phone call from an individual falsely claiming to be a representative of XXXX XXXX. The caller stated ther was a suspicious activity on my account and used this FALSE representation to induce me to supply a one-time PIN. I was told they needed this PIN to close my account and not authorize a purchase. 

This was a bank impersonation / social-engineering scam. At no point did I anything authorize a XXXX transaction or consent to this charge. 

Immediately after this call, I ended the call & called XXXX XXXX to report the incident that had taken place 10 minutes prior. Despite the prompt reporting, the bank has denied my fraud claim on the basis that i provided a PIN. I escalated the matter and case as since been reopened. Case XXXX XXXX XXXX On the call to reopen case, I was told that I provided PIN. Obvious to me that my original call was either ignored or not documented correctly. 

Providing a one time PIN under fraudulent misrepresentation does NOT comfort your authorization in the Fair Credit Billing ACT. The transaction was the result of deception and should be classified as fraudulent.

I am requesting that : 1. The {$3800.00} XXXX charge be permanently removed 2. Any related interest or fees be reversed 3. My account NOT be negatively reported to any credit bureau 4. XXXX XXXX provide a written explanation of its final determination. 

I am asking the CFPB to review this matter and assist in ensuring that this fraudulent charge is properly resolved. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ( last 4 digits ) : XXXX
